import React from 'react'; import { FaGithub, FaTelegramPlane, FaEnvelope } from 'react-icons/fa'; import PageLogo from '../Logo/GnuLinuxLogo.svg'; import HeaderInfoBackgroundImage from '../Background/HeaderTitleInfoBackgroundImage.jpg'; import HeaderMainInfoCurrentPagePalette from '../Background/HeaderMainInfoCurrentPagePalette.svg'; import GitHubLogo from '../Logo/GitHubLogo.svg'; import GitHubPagesLogo from '../Logo/GitHubPagesLogo.png'; import TelegramLogo from '../Logo/TelegramLogo.svg'; import GmailLogo from '../Logo/GmailLogo.png'; import '../HeaderInfo.css'; class HeaderInfo extends React.Component { constructor(props) { super(props); this.state = { domainLogo: props.domainLogo || PageLogo, currentPageName: props.currentPageName || '', backgroundImage: props.backgroundImage || HeaderInfoBackgroundImage, githubLogo: props.githubLogo || GitHubLogo, githubPagesLogo: props.githubLogo || GitHubPagesLogo, githubURL: props.githubURL || "www.github.com", githubPagesURL: props.githubPagesURL || "www.github.com", telegramURL: props.telegramURL || "https://telegram.me/gpdev94", gmailURL: props.gmailURL || "mailto:giuseppe.pedone.developer@gmail.com", domainURL: props.domainName || "www.unix69.githubio.com", pageName: props.pageName || "Unix69", telegramLogo: props.githubLogo || TelegramLogo, gmailLogo: props.githubLogo || GmailLogo, headerInfoClass: props.headerInfoClass || "header-info", headerTitleInfoClass: props.headerTitleInfoClass || "header-title-info", headerTitleInfoBackgroundImageClass: props.headerTitleInfoBackgroundImageClass || "header-title-info-background-image", headerTitleInfoDomainInfoClass: props.headerTitleInfoClass || "header-title-info-domain-info", headerTitleInfoDomainUrlClass: props.headerTitleInfoDomainUrlClass || "header-title-info-domain-url", headerTitleInfoDomainLogoClass: props.headerTitleInfoDomainLogoClass || "header-title-info-domain-logo", headerMainInfoClass: props.headerTitleInfoClass || "header-main-info", headerMainInfoCurrentPageClass: props.headerMainInfoCurrentPageClass || "header-main-info-current-page", headerMainInfoSpaceClass: props.headerMainInfoSpaceClass || "header-main-info-space", headerMainInfoGitHubInfoClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubInfoClass || "header-main-info-github-info", headerMainInfoTelegramInfoClass: props.headerMainInfoTelegramInfoClass || "header-main-info-telegram-info", headerMainInfoGmailInfoClass: props.headerMainInfoGmailInfoClass || "header-main-info-gmail-info", headerMainInfoGitHubUrlClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubUrlClass || "header-main-info-github-url", headerMainInfoGitHubPagesUrlClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubPagesUrlClass || "header-main-info-github-pages-url", headerMainInfoGitHubPagesLogoClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubPagesLogoClass || "header-main-info-github-pages-logo", headerMainInfoGitHubLogoClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubLogoClass || "header-main-info-github-logo", headerMainInfoTelegramLogoClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubPagesLogoClass || "header-main-info-telegram-logo", headerMainInfoGmailLogoClass: props.headerMainInfoGitHubPagesLogoClass || "header-main-info-gmail-logo", headerSubInfoClass: props.headerSubInfoClass || "header-sub-info" }; } render() { return (
{this.state.pageName}
{this.state.currentPageName}
); } } export default HeaderInfo;
